Home.heroTitle: Building America's Fiber Infrastructure — From Backbone to Broadband
Home.heroSubtitle: Underground & aerial, HDD, splicing & testing, restoration. For carriers, data centers, municipalities, and GCs.
Home.leadershipHeading: Built on 40+ Years of Field Leadership
Home.leadershipText: Since 1977, our founder has led outside plant and infrastructure operations across complex field environments. Today, Cloud Telecommunications continues that operational discipline — delivering safe, accountable, and performance-driven fiber infrastructure.
Home.servicesIntro: Full-scope fiber construction from backbone and data center connectivity to FTTH and last-mile.
Home.coverageMobilization: Crews available for deployments; rapid response options for qualified projects.
Home.internationalIntro: We maintain strategic technical collaboration with experienced fiber infrastructure firms internationally, supporting knowledge exchange and best-practice alignment in backbone, metro, and FTTH deployments.
Home.leadershipCompanyYears: {name} brings {experienceYears}+ years of operational fiber construction experience to every project.
Home.capabilitiesIntro: Our capabilities statement summarizes our scope, safety, and experience for carriers, municipalities, and GCs. Download a copy for your vendor files.
Home.ctaSubtitle: Request an RFQ or speak with our operations team to discuss your project.

backbone-longhaul.title: Backbone & Long-Haul
backbone-longhaul.shortDescription: Middle-mile and long-haul fiber routes for carriers and regional networks.

data-center.title: Data Center Connectivity
data-center.shortDescription: Fiber links to and between data centers, including campus and metro rings.

ftth-fttp.title: FTTH/FTTP & Last-Mile
ftth-fttp.shortDescription: Fiber to the home and premises; last-mile distribution and drop deployment.

aerial.title: Aerial Construction
aerial.shortDescription: Pole-line and strand construction; lasher and OSP aerial placement.

underground.title: Underground Construction
underground.shortDescription: Trench, plow, HDD, and conduit placement for OSP underground.

splicing-testing.title: Splicing, Testing & Turn-Up
splicing-testing.shortDescription: Fusion splicing, OTDR and loss testing, and circuit turn-up support.

restoration-closeout.title: Restoration & Closeout
restoration-closeout.shortDescription: Restoration of ROW and pavement; closeout packages and documentation.

Contact.title: Contact / RFQ
Contact.subtitle: Submit a request for quote or reach our team. We respond to RFQs and calls during business hours.
Contact.speakToOpsText: Call or email to schedule a call with our operations team. We can discuss scope, schedule, and mobilization.

About.title: About Us
About.intro: {name} is a US-based fiber infrastructure contractor. We deliver from backbone and middle-mile to FTTH/FTTP and last-mile — for carriers, data centers, municipalities, and general contractors.
About.missionText: We focus on safe, compliant, and well-documented fiber construction. Our approach emphasizes schedule discipline, ROW and 811 compliance, restoration, and long-term asset durability. We work as an extension of your team with clear communication and closeout packages that meet carrier and municipal standards.
About.experienceText: {name} brings {years}+ years of operational fiber construction experience to every project. Our crews and project teams have built backbone, data center, FTTH, and municipal networks. We support nationwide projects where applicable.
About.nextStepsText: Request our prequalification package for your vendor files, or contact us to discuss your project.
